message:
test(pt-core): add bun signature and extend signature test coverage (process_triage-wwxs)

Add builtin bun runtime/test-runner signature to the signature database
and fill spec-required test gaps:
- Bun detection (process name, cmdline, priors, expectations)
- Lifetime expectation validation (test runners 1hr max, dev servers 8hr max)
- Pattern lifecycle transition edge cases and boundary conditions
- Comprehensive spec coverage for all test runners and dev servers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
